name: Beef Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat and onion in a large skillet until the meat is brown.
2. Drain off excess fat. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients (not the spaghetti sauce or shells).
3. Fill the uncooked manicotti shells, packing the filling into both ends.
4. Place the shells in an ungreased baking pan 13 x 9".
5. Pour sauce over manicotti and cover with foil. Put in refrigerator for 3-4 hours.
6. Remove from refrigerator 30 minutes before baking.
7. Heat oven to 375°F (190°C) and bake covered for 1 hour.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and cool 5-10 minutes before serving.
